Retrieves prospect data; prospect website URL available in payload

behavior: Calls Agent 24 (firecrawl_agent.py) via subprocess with --url, --mode crawl, --pages 4
Reads output (cache file path) from stdout
Returns file contents (or empty string on failure)

5. Build user prompt with enhanced prospect data (includes website content)
